title: Pink Bear's Snowy Easter
premise: When snow buries Easter morning, Pink Bear discovers that sometimes the best plans are the ones you have to rebuild together.
character_description: A loyal companion who feels things deeply—disappointment, hope, determination—and acts from love for Susie.
world_description: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.
style_anchor: Warm 2D picture book style for 'Pink Bear's Snowy Easter'. Soft lighting, rich saturated colours, clean 2D illustrative lines. Character: Pink Bear — A loyal companion who feels things deeply—disappointment, hope, determination—and acts from love for Susie.. World: Susie's bedroom and garden in a New England spring, where indoor and outdoor worlds collide.. Consistent look across all 12 pages.
character_visual_notes: **Physical features:** Medium-sized stuffed bear, dusty rose plush fur, slightly worn from love.
**Eyes:** Two black, shiny button eyes, slightly asymmetrical, conveying deep feeling.
**Clothing always worn:** None, just its dusty rose plush fur.
**Signature accessory/prop:** A tiny, faded blue ribbon tied around its neck.
**Visual signature:** One ear slightly flopped over, showing years of love.
**Physical features:** 6-7 years old, slender build, fair skin with rosy cheeks.
**Hair:** Bright blonde, chin-length bob, often slightly tousled.
**Eyes:** Wide, curious sky-blue eyes, often sparkling with imagination.
**Clothing always worn:** Soft lavender cotton pyjamas with tiny white polka dots.
**Signature accessory/prop:** Small, embroidered handkerchief tucked into her pyjama pocket.
**Visual signature:** A small, barely visible freckle on her left cheek.
environment_visual_notes: **Season and weather:** Unseasonably late New England spring, with unexpected, heavy, soft snowfall.
**Time period and lighting:** Early morning, soft, diffused light from snow-covered sky, warm indoor glow.
**Dominant colour palette:** Muted pastels (lavender, dusty rose, pale blue) against crisp whites and natural wood.
**Architectural/natural style:** Cozy, slightly antique New England cottage, with rambling, snow-dusted garden.
**One signature environmental detail:** A small, budding pussy willow branch, visible in every scene.
